sections.sectionTitle: David in a Kumpi Gam Khan'

verses.text: Hih thute khit ciangin David in Filistia mite zo-in nuaisiah a, Filistia mite' khutsung panin Gath leh a khuaneute a la hi
Tua ciangin amah in Moab mite zo a, Moab mite David' nasem suakin siah hong puak uh hi
Zobah leh Hamath gam kumpipa Hadadezer in Eufratis gun kuam gamte ngahkik nuamin hong kuan ahih manin David in amah do-in a zo hi

Tua ciangin David in ama tung panin leeng galkap tul khat, sakol tung tuang galkap tul sagih, leh khe galkap tul sawmnih la hi. Tua ciangin David in leengkai sakol galkap khempeuh a zagui attatsak a, ahih hangin leeng za khat-a' dingin a kicing a sit hi
Zobah kumpi Hadadezer a huh dingin Damaskas-a Syria mite hong pai ciangin David in Syria mite tul sawmnih leh tul nih that hi
Tua ciangin David in Syria gam Damaskas-ah khuacingte koih hi. Tua ciangin Syria mite David' nasem suak uh a, siah a puak uh hi. David a paina peuhpeuhah Topa in gualzosak hi
Tua ciangin David in Hadadezer' nasemte in a puak kham kibawl lumte la-in Jerusalem-ah a ciahpih hi
Tua ciangin Hadadezer' khuapite Tibhath leh Kun panin David in sumngo tampi tak la hi. Solomon in tuate tawh sumngo tuikuangpi leh khuampite leh sumngo umlebeelte a bawl hi
David in Zobah kumpi Hadadezer' galkap buppi a zawhna thu Hamath kumpi Toi in a zak ciangin

Hadadezer simin a zawhna hangin a hopih ding leh a lungdampih dingin Kumpi David kiangah a tapa Joram a sawl hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Hadadezer leh Toi kido zel ngei hi. Amah in kham, ngun, leh sumngo tawh kibawl na namkim khempeuh puak hi
Kumpi David in hihte zong, Edom, Moab, Ammon mite, Filistia mite, leh Amalek, minam khempeuh kiang panin a puakkhiat ngun leh kham tawh Topa' tungah a apkhawm hi
Tua ciangin Zeruiah' tapa Abishai in Ci Kuam-ah Edom mite tul sawm leh tul giat that hi
Tua ciangin amah in Edom-ah khuacingte koih a, Edom mite khempeuh David' nasem a suak uh hi. Topa in David a paina peuhpeuhah gualzosak hi.
Tua ahih ciangin David in Israel mi khempeuh uk a, amah in a mite khempeuh tungah thuman leh thutang a zang hi
Zeruiah' tapa Joab pen galkapte a uk hi a, Ahilud' tapa Jehoshafat pen thuciamtehpa ahi hi
Ahitub' tapa Zadok leh Abiathar' tapa Ahimelek siampite hi a, Shavsha lai-atpa ahi hi
Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah pen Khereth mite leh Peleth mite tungah a uk hi a, David' tapate pen kumpipa' nasepna-ah uliante ahi uh hi.
